# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

parameters:
  appServiceName: string
  sqlDatabaseName: string
  storageAccountName: string
  location: string

variables:
  planName: '{params(appServiceName)}-plan'
  databaseServerName: '{params(sqlDatabaseName)}-server'
  dbUserName: 'your_database_user_name'
  dbPassword: 'your_database_password'

resources:
  resources:
    - apiVersion: '2018-06-01-preview'
      name: '[params(appServiceName)]'
      type: Microsoft.Web/sites
      location: '[params(location)]'
      sku:
        name: Y1
        tier: Basic
      properties:
        serverFarmId: '[resourceId("Microsoft.Web/serverfarms", "[variables(planName)]")]'

    - apiVersion: '2018-04-01-preview'
      name: '[params(databaseServerName)]'
      type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
      location: '[params(location)]'
      properties:
        administratorLogin: '[variables(dbUserName)]'
        administratorLoginPassword: '[parameters(dbPassword)]'
        version: '12.0'

    - apiVersion: '2016-05-01'
      name: '[params(storageAccountName)]'
      type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
      location: '[params(location)]'
      sku:
        name: Standard_LRS
      kind: StorageV2

    - apiVersion: '2018-06-01-preview'
      name: '[params(appServiceName)]-sqlconnection'
      type: Microsoft.Web/sites/config
      location: '[params(location)]'
      parent:
        id: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Web/sites/[params(appServiceName)]'
      properties:
        connectionString: 'Server=[reference(resources('[params(databaseServerName)]')).fullyQualifiedDomainName],Database=[params(sqlDatabaseName)];User ID=[variables(dbUserName)];Password=[parameters(dbPassword)]'
